name: commit-message-ai
description: MEOK AI Labs — Generate conventional commit messages from diffs and descriptions.

tools.name: generate_commit_message
tools.description: Generate a conventional commit message from a description. Auto-detects type, scope, and breaking changes.

tools.name: analyze_diff
tools.description: Parse a git diff and produce a structured summary with files changed, additions, deletions, and suggested commit type.

tools.name: suggest_type
tools.description: Suggest the best conventional commit type for a change description with confidence scoring.

tools.name: validate_conventional
tools.description: Validate a commit message against the Conventional Commits specification and report issues.
